title: Query and view over MCP
description: An AI tool running in a harness uses the local stdio MCP server to query and view the project's RCF tree without shelling out to the CLI.
asA: AI tool running in a harness
iWant: the query and view operations exposed as MCP tools over local stdio
soThat: I can read and report on the project's RCF tree without shelling out to the CLI

acceptanceCriteria.description: An MCP client listing tools sees the query and view operations with structured input and output
acceptanceCriteria.given: a running local stdio MCP server
acceptanceCriteria.then: the query and view operations are present with structured input and output

acceptanceCriteria.description: A coverage query over MCP returns the same result the CLI coverage command returns for the same project
acceptanceCriteria.then: it returns the same result the CLI coverage command returns for the same project

acceptanceCriteria.description: The MCP server communicates over local stdio only and opens no network listener
acceptanceCriteria.then: it communicates over local stdio only and opens no network listener
